user.title: Connect to PushWard
user.description: Enter your PushWard server URL and integration key.

data_description.integration_key: Create one at your PushWard server under Settings → Integration Keys with scope 'ha-*'.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to PushWard server.
error.invalid_url: URL must use http:// or https:// scheme.

data_description.slug: Unique identifier for this activity. Leave empty to auto-generate from entity ID. Example: ha-living-room-lamp
data_description.activity_name: Display name shown on the iPhone Live Activity. Defaults to the entity's friendly name.
data_description.icon: SF Symbol name used as the activity icon. Browse available symbols at [SF Symbols](https://icons8.com/icons/family-sf-symbols). Example: lamp.desk.fill, lightbulb.fill
data_description.priority: Higher priority activities are kept longer when the device limit is reached (0 = lowest, 10 = highest).
data_description.template: Activity layout template. 'generic' works for most entities.
data_description.start_states: Entity states that start the Live Activity. Example: on, heating, playing
data_description.end_states: Entity states that end the Live Activity. Example: off, idle, docked
data_description.update_interval: Minimum seconds between updates to the server. Acts as a rate limit — state changes are sent immediately, but rapid changes are throttled. Example: 5
data_description.progress_attribute: Entity attribute name that holds a 0–100 progress value. Leave empty if not applicable. Example: percentage
data_description.remaining_time_attribute: Entity attribute name that holds remaining time in seconds. Leave empty if not applicable. Example: remaining
data_description.accent_color: Accent color for the Live Activity. Leave empty for default blue.
